title: Candy Crush Saga

We hopen dat je van Candy Crush Saga geniet! 

Het spel wordt elke week bijgewerkt met nieuwe functies, spannende levels en bugfixes, zodat alles lekker blijft draaien.

Ben je een nieuwe speler? Welkom, doe lekker mee!

title: Kingshot
notes:
[New Content]
1. New Feature: The Prestige Shop has been fully upgraded, and the brand-new Prestige Merit Shop is now available! The Ageless Voidstar Skin Series has been upgraded, with new rally skins and other deluxe skins added. After completing the Ageless Voidstar Puzzle, you can also obtain an exclusive domain effect and Prestige Pouch for an even more premium experience.
Successfully unlocking the Skin Series will trigger a server-wide announcement to showcase your extraordinary honor!

•Nieuwe faciliteit: upgrade je fanzone voor clanbonussen en stadionkortingen. 
•Internationaal voetbal: speel ons gloednieuwe evenementtype "Wereldtoernooi". 
•Manageraccessoires: neem de controle in stijl met items met een Noord-Amerikaans thema. 
•Clanverbeteringen: communiceer met nieuwe interacties en emoji-reacties.

title: Magic Sort!
notes:
En je klaar voor een magische nieuwe update?

- Nieuwe 100 levels!
- Bugfixes en verbeteringen

title: Wuthering Waves - To Xuanfang
notes: Fixed some known crashes.

title: West Game II
notes:
* Fortress Feud now lets you send two queues into battle!
* New Sn tags make spotting hero generations a breeze!
* 7 NEW flags added — represent your country in style!
* Borders locked down — no more sneaking into rival Alliance territory.
* UI improvements and bug fixes.

title: Jackpot Magic Slots & Slots
notes:
IT’S SUMMER – Prepare for a refreshing new setting.
KEEP YOUR COOL – Jump straight into your first slot—no delays, no downloads.
A SPLASH OF PARADISE – A smoother, more refined experience awaits.

title: June's Journey - Zoek-en-vind
notes:
REIS LANGS HET ERFGOED - Reis mee langs vergeten mysteries. Ga samen met June en Virginia naar het Midwesten, verzamel beloningen en speel de hele maand tijdgebonden thema-evenementen.

JUNE'S FOTODAGBOEK - Ontdek het geweldige gloednieuwe evenement waarin June haar herinneringen bij elkaar puzzelt. Voltooi vijf foto's om verloren museumstukken te herstellen en unieke beloningen te ontvangen.

notes:

- Chapter 68 Arrives: Put on your pajamas for the perfume workshop.

title: Old School RuneScape
notes:
• Fixed an input issue causing a laggy feel.
• Fixed a crash that could occur during login.
• Fixed an issue where tile highlights did not appear in some areas.
• Fixed an issue where NPC Tag would be lost after relogging.
• Fixed an issue where relogging didn't always bring up the sign in page.

title: Coin Master - Board Adventure
notes: Welcome to Coin Master: Board Adventure, where every dice roll takes you closer to riches, revenge, and all-out fun! Collect coins, attack villages, build your empire, and explore wild new boards full of surprises. It's not just a board game - it's a bold adventure!

title: Billionaire Casino Gokkasten
notes:
Hey, Spinners!
We've got a new update for Billionaire Casino. Read the below to see what changes you can expect!
As always, we're constantly working to improve the game experience for you. We've added minor tweaks and other bug fixes so you can feel even right at home while spinning!
See you at the Casino! Enjoy spinning and win big!
Let's play together and #StayHuuuge!

title: Toy Blast
notes:
Update of Ages!

What happens when Rhino travels thousands of years into the past? A world of caves, stone tools, and friendly cave people is waiting to be explored! Join this timeless adventure in our latest update!

Be sure to update to the latest version of Toy Blast for the newest content. Every 2 weeks, we bring you 50 NEW LEVELS!

Come and have fun!
